scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && cp V2_emailSender.js dist/index.js && cp package*.json dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run install-prod && npm run zip
scripts.create-function: aws lambda create-function --function-name $LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME --runtime nodejs20.x --role $LAMBDA_ROLE_ARN --handler index.handler --timeout 300 --memory-size 512 --zip-file fileb://function.zip
scripts.deploy-all: source .env && npm run package && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy-new: npm run package && npm run create-function && npm run update-env
scripts.invoke: aws lambda invoke --function-name $LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME --payload '{}' output.json && cat output.json && rm output.json
